text:
Market today: Inflation fears are back, pushing up the 10-year Treasury yield. This is the real driver for tech/chip names, as higher rates hurt growth stocks.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -37.85% and QQQI is a SELL at -5.16%. Both need attention. SPAL is also a SELL at -54.77% and very volatile on margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on the 10-year Treasury yield and any further inflation signals.

Bottom line: Manage your downside, especially with leveraged positions on margin.
plays: SOXL: Trim/exit. Leveraged decay and current market conditions are a bad combo.
QQQI: Consider trimming. Income anchor is under pressure.
No new buys today - hold and watch
